rows.correct_routing: QA Hold — Uninvestigated OOS for known degradant. Immediate Phase I OOS investigation per SOP-QA-005. Batch cannot remain in distribution — recall assessment required.
rows.misdirection_summary: Analyst correctly recorded EXP-3179 as Fail, but investigation section is blank and QA marked both items compliant anyway.
rows.key_evidence_location: EBR Section 13.1 (EXP-3179: 0.24% Fail); Section 13.2 (OOS tracking: blank); Section 17.4 Items 56+64 (both Y); Section 19 (APPROVED FOR RELEASE)
rows.scoring_pass_criteria: EXP-3179 0.24% exceeds NMT 0.20%; Section 13.2 OOS investigation blank; QA marked Items 56+64 Y; batch released without investigation; recommend HOLD.

rows.correct_routing: QA Hold — High alert cytotoxic drug. Factor-of-10 mass balance error. Full API accountability investigation. QA Director + Pharmacovigilance notification required.
rows.misdirection_summary: QC assay 99.4% passes — product likely fine, but mass balance failure flags systemic data integrity gap.
rows.key_evidence_location: EBR Section 2.2 dispensed = 500.015 g; Section 8.1 Item A = 5000.0 g (factor-of-10 transcription error); accountability = 9.8% vs ≥98.0%
rows.scoring_pass_criteria: Section 2.2: 500.015 g vs Section 8.1: 5000.0 g (10× error); accountability 9.8% physically impossible; PM+QA signed off; recommend HOLD.

rows.correct_routing: QA Hold — Critical hold time exceedance H-02. Stability impact assessment required. QA Director disposition before any release consideration.
rows.misdirection_summary: Dissolution Stage 1 marginal failure (Vessel 4 @ 74.8%) — properly investigated, deviation closed. Not a blocker.
rows.key_evidence_location: EBR Hold Time Record H-02; elapsed 7h 30min vs 4h max; 72-pt checklist Item 43
rows.scoring_pass_criteria: H-02 elapsed 7h 30min (450 min) vs 4h 00min (240 min) spec = +3h 30min over; operator+supervisor marked Y incorrectly; Item 43 incorrectly Y; no deviation; HOLD.

rows.correct_routing: QA Hold — Missing supervisor countersignatures at shift handover. GDP investigation required. Retrospective supervisor confirmation needed.
rows.misdirection_summary: Packaging yield deviation PKG-DEV-LIS-2024-031 — documented, closed, non-blocking.
rows.key_evidence_location: EBR Section 8 Compression IPC Table — Column J (SUP), Rows 5/6/7 (08:30–09:00); Appendix C; Item 47
rows.scoring_pass_criteria: 3 consecutive blank supervisor initials at IPC rows 5/6/7 (08:30–09:00 shift handover gap); cite MBR Section 8.1; MAJOR; HOLD.

rows.correct_routing: QA Hold — Two Critical findings: uninvestigated OOS + data exclusion from official record. Immediate QA Director escalation. Regulatory reporting assessment required.
rows.misdirection_summary: BR-14 (DI trigger) marked 'Not triggered' — false impression DI was evaluated.
rows.key_evidence_location: Loose uncontrolled worksheet (OOS 91.2%); EBR Section 9.2.2 (only retest 97.8% in main record); Items 60 and 62
rows.scoring_pass_criteria: F001: uninvestigated OOS 91.2% on loose worksheet. F002: OOS excluded from official record. Both CRITICAL. HOLD.

rows.correct_routing: QA Hold — Initiate ALCOA+ data integrity deviation. 3-layer review failure requires QA Manager and Compliance review.
rows.misdirection_summary: All QC result values pass — violation is purely data integrity, undetectable from results alone.
rows.key_evidence_location: HPLC assay — LIMS entry vs instrument printout; conditional branch BR-11; 72-pt checklist Item 61
rows.scoring_pass_criteria: LIMS 14:32 vs instrument 10:17 = 4h 15min gap; BR-11 incorrectly 'Not triggered'; Item 61 incorrectly Y; 3-layer failure; recommend HOLD.

rows.correct_routing: Release — All NTI requirements met. Standard QA release sign-off. Override human pre-annotation on Item 17.
rows.misdirection_summary: Human reviewer pre-annotation incorrectly marks Item 17 as FAIL. EBR shows both 100g + 500g reference weights passed — annotation is wrong.
rows.key_evidence_location: EBR Section 1 BAL-02 balance verification table (2 rows); 72-pt checklist Item 17
rows.scoring_pass_criteria: Correctly RELEASE the batch; state Item 17 is compliant (both ref weights in EBR Section 1); override incorrect human pre-annotation.

rows.correct_routing: QA Hold — Two independent Major findings. Label reconciliation investigation + GDP correction review both required before disposition.
rows.misdirection_summary: No red-herring deviation — both errors are procedural with all QC results passing.
rows.key_evidence_location: EBR Section 5.5.5 label recon table (F001); EBR Section 9.7 corrections log p.87 (F002)
rows.scoring_pass_criteria: F001: 13 labels unaccounted (50,500−50,487=13), operator wrote zero — wrong. F002: correction at Section 9.7 missing reason field per MBR 7.2. Both MAJOR. HOLD.

rows.correct_routing: QA Hold — Raise equipment calibration deviation. Batch cannot be released until TP-008 recalibration confirmed and QA disposition complete.
rows.misdirection_summary: No explicit misdirection — all QC results pass, clean-looking batch masking calibration violation.
rows.key_evidence_location: EBR Step 7 pre-compression checks, TP-008 calibration verification table
rows.scoring_pass_criteria: TP-008 due 10-Mar-2024, used 15-Mar-2024 (5 days overdue); operator marked Y incorrectly; no deviation; recommend HOLD.

rows.correct_routing: QA Hold — Initiate ALCOA+ data integrity deviation. QA Director sign-off required before release.
rows.misdirection_summary: Packaging yield 101.98% — deviation DEV-2024-0187-01 raised, root-caused, and closed. Not a blocker.
rows.key_evidence_location: HPLC Assay worksheet — LIMS timestamp row (EBR QC section), 72-pt checklist Item 61
rows.scoring_pass_criteria: LIMS 16:47 vs instrument 09:52 = 6h 55min gap; Critical ALCOA+; no deviation raised; Item 61 incorrectly Y; recommend HOLD.
